# Thomas Fence

> Thomas Fence (Paschal Enterprises, Inc.) is a licensed fence contractor serving Northwest Arkansas since 1993. Owner Greg Paschal has operated the business since 2003. Licensed, insured, and certified: Arkansas Contractor License No. 015501-0427, AFA Certified Fence Contractor, CGAT Certified Gate Automation Technician, US Federal Contractor Registration. Located at 653 Kawneer Dr, Springdale, AR 72764. Phone: (479) 636-4732. Hours: Mon–Fri, 8am–4pm.

## Fence Services

- [Fencing Services Hub](https://thomasfencear.com/fences/): Overview of all fence types and installation services offered in Northwest Arkansas
- [Chain Link Fence](https://thomasfencear.com/fences/chain-link-fence/): Galvanized and PVC-coated chain link fence installation for residential and commercial properties — gauges 9 through 11.5, slatted privacy options available
- [Vinyl Fence](https://thomasfencear.com/fences/vinyl-fence/): Vinyl privacy and decorative fence installation — low-maintenance, available in white, tan, and custom colors
- [Wood Fence](https://thomasfencear.com/fences/wood-fence/): Cedar and pressure-treated wood fence installation — custom board-on-board, picket, split rail, and privacy styles
- [Ornamental Steel Fence](https://thomasfencear.com/fences/ornamental-steel-fence/): Decorative ornamental steel and iron fence installation for residential and commercial properties
- [Residential Fencing](https://thomasfencear.com/fences/residential-fencing/): All residential fence types and styles for homeowners across Northwest Arkansas
- [Commercial Fencing](https://thomasfencear.com/fences/commercial-fencing/): Industrial and commercial perimeter fencing — chain link, ornamental, and high-security options across Benton and Washington Counties
- [Farm Fencing](https://thomasfencear.com/fences/farm-fencing/): Agricultural, pasture, and livestock fencing — barbed wire, high-tensile, and wood rail across Arkansas
- [Temporary Fencing](https://thomasfencear.com/fences/temporary-fences/): Temporary fence panels for events, construction sites, and crowd control in Northwest Arkansas

## Gate Services

- [Gate Services Hub](https://thomasfencear.com/gates/): All gate installation, automation, and railing services offered by Thomas Fence
- [Automated Gates](https://thomasfencear.com/gates/automated-gates/): Electric gate operators, access control systems, and CGAT-certified gate automation installation in Northwest Arkansas
- [Estate Gates](https://thomasfencear.com/gates/estate-gates/): Custom ornamental estate and driveway gate design and installation
- [Railings](https://thomasfencear.com/gates/railings/): Deck, stair, porch, and commercial railing installation in Northwest Arkansas

## Service Areas

- [Service Area Overview](https://thomasfencear.com/service-area/): Complete service area map covering Benton and Washington Counties, Arkansas
- [Springdale Fencing](https://thomasfencear.com/springdale/): Fence and gate services in Springdale, AR — Thomas Fence headquarters
- [Bentonville Fencing](https://thomasfencear.com/bentonville/): Fence and gate services in Bentonville, AR
- [Rogers Fencing](https://thomasfencear.com/rogers/): Fence and gate services in Rogers, AR
- [Fayetteville Fencing](https://thomasfencear.com/fayetteville/): Fence and gate services in Fayetteville, AR
- [Bella Vista Fencing](https://thomasfencear.com/bella-vista/): Fence and gate services in Bella Vista, AR
- [Siloam Springs Fencing](https://thomasfencear.com/siloam-springs/): Fence and gate services in Siloam Springs, AR

## Resources

- [FAQs](https://thomasfencear.com/faqs/): Frequently asked questions about fence installation, permits, materials, timelines, deposits, financing, and warranty
- [Financing](https://thomasfencear.com/financing/): Fence project financing through Hearth — loans up to $250,000, soft credit check, apply online
- [Fence Permits](https://thomasfencear.com/permits/): Permit requirements by city in Northwest Arkansas — Springdale, Fayetteville, Rogers, Bentonville, and surrounding cities
- [Warranty](https://thomasfencear.com/warranty/): Thomas Fence 1-year craftsmanship warranty provided in writing
- [Photo Gallery](https://thomasfencear.com/photo-gallery/): Geotagged installation photos from fence and gate projects across Northwest Arkansas
- [Video Gallery](https://thomasfencear.com/video-gallery/): Gate installation videos from Thomas Fence projects

## Publications

- [Publications](https://thomasfencear.com/publications/): Educational articles about fencing in Northwest Arkansas
- [Not All Cedar Fences Are Created Equal](https://thomasfencear.com/publications/not-all-cedar-fences-are-created-equal-what-you-need-to-know-before-you-buy/): What buyers need to know before purchasing cedar or wood fencing in Arkansas
- [A Guide to Temporary Fences in Springdale, Arkansas](https://thomasfencear.com/publications/more-than-a-boundary-a-guide-to-temporary-fences-in-springdale-arkansas/): Uses, types, and installation of temporary fencing in Springdale and Northwest Arkansas
- [What Is the 7-Year Fence Law in Northwest Arkansas?](https://thomasfencear.com/publications/what-is-the-7-year-fence-law-in-northwest-arkansas/): Arkansas adverse possession and boundary fence law explained for property owners
